title: Montazels, France
text: **Grace’s corner** Bonjour from Montazels! I am actually not with Rushan in the Dolomites (despite the website suggesting otherwise), but the Southern French countryside with my mum and dad. Montazels is lovely and very relaxed, despite being caught in the current French heatwave. Pleased to report we have done a lot of reading, swimming, napping and eating.
